title: brosimum oligandrum
intro: Brosimum oligandrum, also known as the "Oval Leaf Tree" or "Palo de Burro", is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Brosimum oligandrum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, as well as being used to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Brosimum oligandrum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and are often used in traditional folk medicine.
